title: Glow in The Dark Water Gel Magic, Magic Elves Kit with 12 Creatures,Water Bead Sensory Squishy Toys for 3+ Girls Boys,19PCS 3D Aqua Park Set Educational Toys for Kids Birthday Gift
features: 【Glow in the Dark】Unlike others, our water elves kits contain hydrogels that glow in the dark. Just need to shine it under sunlight or light for 10-20 minutes (The longer the time, the more obvious the night light effect.), it will glow brilliantly in the dark. Stow them away and it will be the best bedtime companion for kids. With it, your child won't be afraid of the dark anymore.

【12 Shapes &8 Bottles of Hydrogel】6 double-sided moulds with a total of 12 shapes to make, including vegetables and sea creatures. By making magic gel toys, children can identify not only colours, but also sea creatures, vegetables and more as they play.

【Safe&Non-toxic】Our DIY water sprite set is made of non-toxic and non-hazardous material that meets International certification standards. It is safe for children to play and parents can rest assured.

【Easy to Use】Simply pour the gel into the mould and place it in the water. In this way you can create lovely colourful action figures.It's easy for kids to enjoy a sense of achievement, develop hands-on skills, imagination and improve hand-eye coordination.

【Ideal Handmade Gift】A perfect birthday/Christmas/Easter gift for girls or boys aged 3 4 5 6 7+.Let them enjoy the joy of playing with their hands and develop their autonomy.It is also an ideal interactive toy for parents and children, and for children to interact with each other.
【Anti-spill Design】The colour gel has a cap and a pointed tip design, which effectively prevents the gel from getting on your fingers or home.
description: Product Description Play Safely and Happily Security Certified & Standards Compliant Our water sprite set is made of high quality material. It is safe for children to play and parents can rest assured. International Approval: EU MSDS certification for children's products, meets EN71 standards. Anti-spill Design:Liquid are completely sealed with an extruded design that prevents leakage and ensures safe play.
